    resp = requests.post(url, json={"image_path": image_path}, timeout=30)
    print(resp.status_code)
    print(resp.text)
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error: {e}")

  POST http://localhost:32823/web/search
- web_fetch(url*, timeout_seconds): Fetch full webpage content for a URL.
  POST http://localhost:32823/web/fetch
